plugins.name: falke-bid-tools

plugins.name: falke-business-pulse
plugins.description: Falke's morning Chief-of-Staff routine: read both Falke mailboxes, calendar, and Dropbox; produce a one-page business pulse; draft (never send) nudges; post one Teams digest.
